# CWE-841: Improper Enforcement of Behavioral Workflow
lang: go
file: CWE-841-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct {
	ID    uint
	Email string
	MFAPassed bool
}

// Vulnerable: password reset proceeds without confirming MFA step completed.
func ResetAccount(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	email := c.PostForm("email")
	newPass := c.PostForm("new_password")
	db.Model(&Account{}).Where("email = ?", email).Update("password", newPass)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
